highlights.text: New York (3N) → Las Vegas (3N) → San Francisco (4N) ultra-luxury circuit
Private guided NYC tours — Statue of Liberty, MoMA & VIP Broadway
Strip-front Las Vegas luxury & exclusive Grand Canyon helicopter
Private yacht Golden Gate tour & Napa Valley vineyard visits
Serial US-004 | Ultimate Luxury USA Experience

itinerary.title: Luxury USA Experience
itinerary.tagline: New York • Las Vegas • Grand Canyon • San Francisco • Napa Valley
itinerary.overview: Experience the epitome of opulence with a TRAGUIN curated journey across the United States. From the bustling energy of Manhattan to the neon lights of Las Vegas and the scenic beauty of San Francisco, this luxury USA holiday offers unforgettable memories with premium handpicked hotels and private luxury transportation.
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 10 Nights / 11 Days USA package (US-004): New York City, Las Vegas, Grand Canyon helicopter, San Francisco yacht tour, and Napa Valley.

highlights.text: Statue of Liberty, MoMA & VIP Broadway Access

days.title: New York City — Arrival
days.description: Private chauffeur welcome at JFK. Check into a five-star Manhattan sanctuary. Evening dining experience overlooking the skyline.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP chauffeur airport welcome, private hotel transfer
Overnight Stay: New York City (Ultra-Luxury Hotel)

days.title: New York City — Iconic Attractions
days.description: Private guided tours of the Statue of Liberty and MoMA. VIP access to a Broadway show — immersive experiences across the Big Apple.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Statue of Liberty tour, MoMA visit, VIP Broadway access
Overnight Stay: New York City (Ultra-Luxury Hotel)

days.title: New York City — Cultural Immersion
days.description: Continue exploring Manhattan's iconic attractions with private guiding. Premium shopping and curated dining in the world's greatest city.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private guided Manhattan cultural tour
Overnight Stay: New York City (Ultra-Luxury Hotel)

days.title: Las Vegas — Desert Luxury Arrival
days.description: First-class flight to Las Vegas. Check into a Strip-front luxury resort. Explore world-class dining and exclusive nightlife.
activities: Sightseeing Included: First-class flight to Las Vegas, private resort transfer
Overnight Stay: Las Vegas (Strip-Front Ultra-Luxury Resort)

days.title: Las Vegas — Premium Leisure
days.description: A day of exclusive leisure on the Strip — premium shopping, world-class dining, and curated entertainment experiences.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Premium Strip leisure and dining experiences
Overnight Stay: Las Vegas (Strip-Front Ultra-Luxury Resort)

days.title: Grand Canyon — Breathtaking Landscapes
days.description: Exclusive helicopter tour over the Grand Canyon. Witness breathtaking landscapes from the sky — a true TRAGUIN Signature Experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Exclusive Grand Canyon helicopter tour
Overnight Stay: Las Vegas (Strip-Front Ultra-Luxury Resort)

days.title: San Francisco — Scenic Arrival
days.description: Arrival in the Bay Area. Private transfer to your luxury hotel. Evening orientation along the waterfront.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Flight to San Francisco, private hotel transfer

days.title: San Francisco — Yacht & Napa Valley
days.description: Private yacht tour of the Golden Gate Bridge. Intimate visits to Napa Valley's finest vineyards.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private yacht Golden Gate tour, Napa Valley vineyard visits

days.title: San Francisco — Cultural Delights
days.description: Explore local markets, historic neighborhoods, and high-end shopping on Union Square.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Union Square shopping, historic neighborhood tour

days.title: San Francisco — Pacific Leisure
days.description: Relax in a handpicked luxury hotel overlooking the Pacific. Final evening celebration of your American journey.
activities: Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Farewell Dinner

days.title: Departure
days.description: Private transfer to SFO for your journey home, leaving with memories curated by TRAGUIN.

inclusions.text: 10 Nights in ultra-luxury hotels across New York City, Las Vegas, and San Francisco
Private chauffeur-driven VIP airport and ground transfers
First-class / premium domestic flights between cities
Private guided Statue of Liberty, MoMA, and VIP Broadway access in New York
Exclusive Grand Canyon helicopter tour — TRAGUIN Signature Experience
Private yacht Golden Gate tour and Napa Valley vineyard visits
Welcome amenities and TRAGUIN 24/7 luxury concierge support
International and internal domestic airfares unless stated
Optional tours, Broadway show entries, and specialized evening activities
Personal expenses, laundry, telephone calls, and boutique purchases
Optional helicopter rides or private boat charters
Comprehensive international travel and health insurance
Tipping, porterage fees, and newly introduced government surcharges
